'''Mika'sai'Malloc''' was the daughter of [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]]. She witnessed the execution of her father after he was captured by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and placed in a field with a [[quarra]].
